tasks.name: Book a 7-day guided tour to Japan in April 2025 under $2,000 per person for 2 adults with 3-star hotels
tasks.description: Find a guided tour to Japan that lasts exactly 7 days, departs in April 2025, costs at most $2,000 per person, and add a booking for 2 adults with 3-star accommodation to the cart or booking flow.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Tours."
In the destination filter on the tours page, open the dropdown and select "Japan" as the country.
In the start date or departure filter, open the date picker and choose any available departure within "April 2025."
Use the duration filter control (slider or checkboxes) to show only tours with a duration of "7 days."
Locate the price filter per person and set the maximum price to "2000" (US dollars).
Open the sorting dropdown and select the option "Price: Low to High."
From the updated results list, click on the first tour card that displays a duration of 7 days.
On the tour detail page, set the number of travelers to "2 adults" and select the "3-star hotel" option in the accommodation category field.
Click the primary action button labeled "Add to cart" or "Proceed to booking details" to add this tour for 2 adults with 3-star hotels to the booking flow.

tasks.name: Create a 'Paris Weekend' reading list with 3 museum-related blog posts
tasks.description: Use the blog to find and save exactly 3 articles about Paris museums, then create a reading list called 'Paris Weekend' and add those 3 saved articles to that list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation link labeled "Blog."
In the blog search field, type "Paris museums" and submit the search using the search button or Enter key.
On the search results page, scroll to the first three article cards and, on each of these three cards, click the bookmark or save icon to add them to your saved articles.
Click on your profile or account icon in the header and select the "Saved Articles" or "Reading Lists" option from the dropdown.
On the saved articles page, click the "Create new list" button and enter "Paris Weekend" into the list name field, then save the new list.
On the same page, select the three "Paris museums" articles you just saved using their checkboxes or selection controls.
Use the "Add to list" or similar action, choose the "Paris Weekend" list from the options, and confirm the action so all three selected articles are added to that list.

tasks.name: Compare two Spain beach packages in July 2025 and add the higher-rated one (ties broken by lower price) to wishlist
tasks.description: Find beach vacation packages in Spain for July 2025 with ratings 4.0 or higher, compare the first two, and add the one with the higher rating (or lower price if ratings are equal) to the wishlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled "Packages."
On the packages page, open the destination or country filter and select "Spain."
Apply the theme or trip type filter by choosing the option labeled "Beach" or "Beach holiday."
Locate the travel month filter and set it to "July 2025."
Use the duration filter to show only packages between "5" and "7" nights.
Set the customer rating filter so that only packages with a rating of at least "4.0" are shown.
In the filtered results list, tick the compare checkbox (or equivalent selection control) on the first and second package cards.
Click the "Compare selected" button to open the comparison view for these two packages.

In the comparison view, identify the package with the higher customer rating, or if both have the same rating, identify the one with the lower price, then click that package’s "Add to wishlist" button.

tasks.name: Select the cheapest non-stop flight + hotel bundle from Los Angeles to New York under $1,200 for Sept 10–13, 2025
tasks.description: Search for flight + hotel bundles from Los Angeles (LAX) to New York (JFK) for September 10–13, 2025 for 1 adult, filter to non-stop flights, sort by lowest total price, and start booking the cheapest option under $1,200.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Flight + Hotel" or "Bundles" tab in the main navigation or booking widget.
In the "From" field, open the location dropdown and select "Los Angeles (LAX)."
In the "To" field, open the location dropdown and select "New York (JFK)."
Open the date picker, set the check-in or departure date to "September 10, 2025" and the check-out or return date to "September 13, 2025."
Set the travelers field to "1 adult" and ensure the stay length is 3 nights if a separate control exists.
In the flight filters section, enable the option labeled "Non-stop only" or equivalent to show only non-stop flights.
Open the sort dropdown for bundles and select "Total price: Low to High."
From the sorted list, identify and click on the first bundle whose displayed total price is less than or equal to "$1,200."
On the selected bundle’s detail page, click the primary button labeled "Continue to traveler details" or similar to move to the next booking step without entering payment information.

tasks.name: Sign up for a weekly budget travel newsletter using a test email
tasks.description: Access the newsletter subscription form, choose budget travel topics, set the frequency to weekly, and subscribe using the email address test@example.com.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Scroll to the footer and click on the link labeled "Travel Newsletter" or "Subscribe."
On the newsletter sign-up page, click into the name field and type "Alex Traveler."
Click into the email field and type "test@example.com."
In the topics or interests section, select the checkbox or option labeled "Budget travel" and optionally "Travel tips" if available.
Open the frequency dropdown and choose "Weekly" as the email frequency.
Tick the checkbox indicating agreement to receive promotional emails or terms, if such a checkbox is present on the form.
Click the "Subscribe" button to submit the newsletter subscription form.

tasks.name: Reserve a family-friendly Rome hotel for Aug 1–5, 2025 with 4.5+ rating, free breakfast and Wi-Fi under $250/night
tasks.description: Find a family-friendly hotel in Rome, Italy for 2 adults and 2 children from August 1–5, 2025 with guest rating at least 4.5, free breakfast, free Wi-Fi, and a price of at most $250 per night, then select a free-cancellation room and add it to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Hotels."
In the destination field, type "Rome" and select "Rome, Italy" from the suggestions list.
Open the date picker and set the check-in date to "August 1, 2025" and the check-out date to "August 5, 2025."
Open the guests selector and set it to "2 adults" and "2 children."
In the filters section, enable the "Family-friendly" filter and select the amenities "Free breakfast" and "Free Wi-Fi."
Set the nightly price filter so that the maximum price per night is "$250" and adjust the guest rating filter so only hotels with a rating of at least "4.5" are shown.
Open the sorting dropdown and choose "Guest rating: High to Low."
From the filtered results, click on the first hotel card in the list to open its detail page.
On the hotel detail page, select a room type that is labeled "Free cancellation" and click the "Add to cart" or "Reserve room" button to add this room for the specified dates and guests.

tasks.name: Choose a mid-tier travel insurance plan for a $3,000, 14-day trip and review policy details
tasks.description: Use the blog to reach the insurance services page, select the mid-tier (Standard) insurance plan, configure it for a $3,000 trip lasting 14 days from June 1–14, 2025, and proceed to the policy review page.
steps: From the website homepage, click on the main navigation link labeled "Blog."
In the blog search bar, type "travel insurance comparison" and submit the search.
On the search results page, click on the first article to open the travel insurance comparison article.
Within the article page, locate and click the "Travel Insurance" or "Get insurance" services link in the sidebar or within the article content.
On the travel insurance plans page, identify the three tiers (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium) and click on the plan card labeled "Standard" or the middle-tier option.
On the plan configuration form, click the "Trip cost" field and enter "3000" as the total trip cost in US dollars.
Set the trip duration or number of travel days field to "14" days if available.
Use the date picker to set the coverage start date to "June 1, 2025" and the end date to "June 14, 2025."
In the optional add-ons section, select the checkbox for "Trip cancellation protection" if it is available for this plan.
Click the button labeled "Review policy details" or similar to proceed to the policy review screen with these settings.

tasks.name: Build and save a 6-night Italy itinerary (Rome, Florence, Venice) for May 10, 2025 with 3-star hotels and tours
tasks.description: Use the Custom Trip Builder to create a multi-city itinerary in Italy: 2 nights in Rome, 2 nights in Florence, and 2 nights in Venice starting May 10, 2025, with 3-star hotels and at least one guided tour in Rome and Venice, then save the itinerary as 'Italy May 2025'.
steps: From the website homepage, click on the main navigation item labeled "Custom Trip Builder."
On the trip builder page, open the country selector and choose "Italy."
In the cities section, add "Rome" as the first city and set the stay duration for Rome to "2 nights."
Click the "Add city" button, add "Florence" as the second city, and set its stay duration to "2 nights."
Click the "Add city" button again, add "Venice" as the third city, and set its stay duration to "2 nights."
Open the date picker for the trip start and set the start date to "May 10, 2025" so that the tool allocates subsequent nights across the three cities.
In the accommodation preferences section, select the "3-star hotels" option so it applies to all cities in the itinerary.
In the activities section for Rome, add one guided tour by selecting the first available option labeled "City walking tour" or similar.
In the activities section for Venice, add one activity by selecting the first available option labeled "Canal boat tour" or similar.
In the itinerary name field, type "Italy May 2025" and click the "Save itinerary" button to store this multi-city trip configuration.
